steps.title: Turn on heat block and set to 37ºC
steps.instruction: Turn on heat block and set to 37ºC

steps.title: Label clean 0
steps.instruction: Label clean 0.5mL microcentrifuge tubes with SampleID by writing on the tube lid directly with a fine point Sharpie

steps.title: Remove one aliquot each of stock...
steps.instruction: Remove one aliquot each of stock Xhol enzyme and rCutSmart Buffer from the freezer. Vortex gently to mix. Spin down in mini spinner, if necessary

steps.title: Prepare XhoI working solution by combining...
steps.instruction: Prepare XhoI working solution by combining 62µL rCutSmart Buffer and 62µL stock Xhol enzyme in a 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Aliquot 1µL Xhol working solution into...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 1µL Xhol working solution into the bottom of each labeled 0.5mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Transfer 5µL PocHIS amplicons to each 0
steps.instruction: Transfer 5µL PocHIS amplicons to each 0.5mL tube. Always double check that you are adding the correct sample to the correct tube

steps.title: Flick each tube gently to mix
steps.instruction: Flick each tube gently to mix. Spin down tubes in mini spinner

steps.title: Incubate all tubes at 37ºC for...
steps.instruction: Incubate all tubes at 37ºC for 60 minutes , then 65ºC for 20 minutes

steps.title: If possible, visualize digests immediately on gel
steps.instruction: If possible, visualize digests immediately on gel. Otherwise, store in fridge
